title: Sol Foundation 2nd Annual Symposium
detail: The Sol Foundation holds its second annual symposium, building on the momentum of its inaugural 2023 Stanford event. The gathering draws expanded participation from academics, former government officials, and international researchers. The foundation's growing institutional credibility signals a shift in how mainstream academia engages with UAP research, moving from fringe to legitimate scientific inquiry. Papers presented cover materials science, policy frameworks, and historical analysis of government UAP programs.
